file_summary: This is a devcontainer.json configuration file for setting up a development container for the pallets/itsdangerous Python project. It specifies a Python 3 development container image, configures VS Code settings for Python development, and defines an onCreateCommand script to run when the container is created.

line_windows.summary: This window contains the entire devcontainer.json configuration. Lines 1-2 define the container name and base Python 3 image. Lines 3-13 configure VS Code settings for Python development, including interpreter path, terminal activation, and launch arguments. Lines 14-16 specify the onCreateCommand script that runs when the container is created. The entire file is a single JSON object with all configuration properties.
